title: Luffy Enters the War
main_description: Luffy breaks into the battlefield as pirates and Marines clash around Ace’s execution platform. The chapter mainly follows Magellan, Brook, Spandam, Whitebeard, keeping the focus on the Marineford War storyline.
key_events: Luffy Enters the War: Rising Conflict
Luffy Enters the War: Key Exchange
Luffy Enters the War: Turning Point
